disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Crops of small purple, flat-topped bumps appeared on the wrists (and some on the ankles) about 3 days ago
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the bumps — colour, shape, where they are?
When did they first appear?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're small, purple, flat-topped bumps — mostly on the insides of my wrists and a few on my ankles. They came up about three days ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, unrelenting itch, worse at night, with scratching to the point of open, raw skin and two nights of sleep loss
trigger_question_examples: How bad is the itch and is it affecting your sleep?
Have you broken the skin scratching?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The itch is unbearable, especially at night. I've scratched some spots raw and they're bleeding a little. I haven't slept in two days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is frightened the rash is a contagious or parasitic infection
trigger_question_examples: What are you most worried this might be?
Is there a particular concern on your mind?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm scared it's something contagious — like a bug or mites I've picked up. It looks awful and I don't want to give it to anyone.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies any new soaps, detergents, creams, or other new skin exposures
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new soaps, detergents, cosmetics or creams?
Anything new touching your skin recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing new — same soap, same washing powder, no new creams or jewellery.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I really don't think it's anything I've touched, I haven't changed a thing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies starting any new oral medications
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new tablets or medicines recently?
Any new prescriptions or over-the-counter medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not taking any regular medicines and I haven't started anything new.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies any breathing difficulty, throat tightness, wheeze, or other respiratory symptoms
trigger_question_examples: Any trouble breathing, throat tightness or wheeze?
Have you felt short of breath at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing is fine — no tightness, no wheeze, nothing like that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, and the scratched areas are not hot, rapidly swelling, or draining pus
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a fever, or do any of the scratched areas feel hot or look swollen?
Is any spot oozing yellow pus or spreading redness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever that I can tell, and the scratches don't feel hot or swollen — no pus or spreading redness, just raw where I've scratched.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Older bumps have started fading to flat, darker brown marks
trigger_question_examples: Are the older spots changing at all?
Have any of them left a mark as they settle?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Some of the older ones have gone flatter and left brownish marks behind.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No bumps, ulcers or soreness inside the mouth or on the genitals
trigger_question_examples: Any sores, white patches or soreness in your mouth or genital area?
Have you noticed anything similar on your lips, gums or genitals?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing in my mouth or down below — it's just on my wrists and ankles.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one at home to help monitor the skin
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone at home with you?
Do you have support if things got worse overnight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own, so there's no one here to keep an eye on it.
